name: Get Call Count by Month for a Zip

content.query:
SELECT 
cst.Zip
,MONTH(cls.CallDate) as CallMonth
,count(1) as CallCount
--,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_CALL] cls
 --,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 where
 cls.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 --and cls.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
 and cls.OperatingCompany = 'FHI' 
 and cls.CallDate >= '2022-01-01'
 --and lds.EntryDate >= '2022-01-01'
 and cst.Zip = '33143'
group BY
MONTH(cls.CallDate)
,cst.Zip
order by MONTH(cls.CallDate) asc
